results.title: Toothless Tigers no match for Hawks as Wizard, Lewis run riot
China: Man swims through flood water for 3 hours to check on elderly parents
results.description: A man, identified as 30-year-old Xie swam for 3 hours to reach his parents in the village. He took the help of a tyre and was accompanied by a friend in the arduous journey. While Xie and his 2 siblings live in the town, his parents stay in a village in Qinzhou, which is around 10 kilometres away.

results.title: Luke Wilson teases 'The Family Stone' sequel, says, "I can't believe it's happening"
results.description: Luke Wilson has confirmed that The Family Stone sequel is moving forward, calling the script "really funny" and expressing excitement about reuniting with the original cast.

results.title: Massive explosion in illegal firecracker factory in Ahmedabad, painful death of 8 people, many seriously burnt.
results.description: Eight people died, while many suffered serious burns in a massive explosion and fire in an illegally operated firecracker factory in Ramol area of ​​Ahmedabad. The license of the factory had already been cancelled. Police have registered the case and started investigation and relief operations are underway.

results.title: 1 in 8 Kashmiri children has enamel defects: Study
results.description: Srinagar: One in every eight children attending the Dental Specialty Hospital in Kashmir has developmental defects of enamel (DDE), a new study has found. results.title: What can we learn from the measles outbreak?
results.description: Bangladesh is facing a heart-breaking tragedy that should have never happened. We are fast approaching 800 infant deaths since March 15 from a disease the country pledged to eliminate more than a decade ago. Measles is very much preventable, detectable, and controllable. A safe and effective vaccine has existed for nearly 60 years averting an estimated 59 million deaths from measles globally... Details
